name: design-loop
description: Codex-native design-aware sub-track with portable references, provenance, deterministic design checks, fidelity evidence, and human Gate-2 review.

interface.longDescription: Use portable design references, state matrices, provenance, token and contrast checks, advisory fidelity diffs, and Gate-2 visual evidence without relying on Claude Design or Workflow scripts.
